system.requirement: If you are clad with the wilderness…

abilities.description:
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} by unleashing your rage (decide before rolling), mark +1 progress on a hit. Then, choose one.

  • Push yourself: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-1).
  • Lose yourself: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-1).

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm}, and your health is greater than 0, you may let the pain inflame your fury (decide before rolling). If you then score a strong hit and choose to embrace the pain, take +momentum equal to your remaining health. A weak hit counts as a miss.

When you enter a frenzy state, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2). During frenzy, you can only make combat and suffer moves. When doing so, add +1. To return to normal state, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum}.
